hash_28dd2651937dd0f: ^1Arkadeus: ^7The last surviving member of your unit, still desperately clinging to life - shall we end that struggle?
hash_5690ed01397d06f: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Prison is a state of mind, Ajax - you carry yours with you - you've lost sight of your cage.
hash_728634ec029edc3: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Accept that the old world is gone.  It's time for something new.  Something radical.
hash_8f244c06d873841: ^1Arkadeus: ^7It comes to this - no lives remain.
hash_92cb6b00b0356a5: ^1Arkadeus: ^7I've been looking forward to this.  A worthy test for the skills I've gathered.
hash_9e7e96e02c16764: ^1Arkadeus: ^7The rest of your team have fallen.  Can you rise above their failure?
hash_cc010b9e837fef7: ^1Arkadeus: ^7I was wondering when you'd show your face Spectre.  We should work together.
hash_d94c18b4368f542: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Your time - and my patience - runs short.
hash_117e103b5ba674de: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Arkadeus is going to rebuild the world Torque, aren't you intrigued to find out why?
hash_125dd089ea2f76f2: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Arkadeus only accepts superior specimens, and your performance is sub-par.
hash_12867ef6b00d7956: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're losing this fight.  Is your strength already spent?
hash_15548b46e262a083: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Did I overestimate your will to survive?  Is this challenge too much?
hash_193d92c072a84fae: ^1Arkadeus: ^7No more second chances - you're out of lives.
hash_19d7efb726079b18: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Where's your will to survive?  Are you giving in to the inevitable?
hash_1a4cfa34ff250b05: ^1Arkadeus: ^7A draw?  Are you trying to irritate me?
hash_1be9827e0d5a0975: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You've done an excellent job of improving yourself, Prophet - show me you're worthy.
hash_1c8e4225a05b0bb9: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You've taken control.  Now you're getting it.
hash_1e938fc4497180e1: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Your elimination paves the way to a Golden Age.
hash_1fe96c5d78bece9a: ^1Arkadeus: ^7We both seek to end suffering, Doctor, even if our methods differ.
hash_21c36013021f1671: ^1Arkadeus: ^7I hope you make the grade, Engineer - I've some bugs you'll enjoy working through.
hash_225fd6a499fdd138: ^1Arkadeus: ^7I'm not street trash to be pushed around - come at me Enforcer, it won't end well.
hash_2441ff81721829e1: ^1Arkadeus: ^7This project has no place for weaklings.  Change my perception or suffer the consequences.
hash_244bd2893964738a: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Stop resisting.  Join us.  We'll smash the system together.
hash_259d167d0535d5b1: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're all that's left.  Extinction is calling.
hash_27ca340e2d485905: ^1Arkadeus: ^7These could be your last seconds, spend them wisely.
hash_282df1610547181a: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Why do you fight me? I will restore the green places of this world to their halcyon state.
hash_28c95b8aeee86249: ^1Arkadeus: ^7I decide who lives or dies.  Do I make myself clear?
hash_2a0c1fe4684bdede: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Arkadeus could use your focus and skill.  It would be unfortunate to waste such talent.
hash_2ae740ca97be06a0: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Why do you suffer the weak to live, Physician?  You undo evolutions' great work.
hash_2bc611b6753cce10: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You could have walked away, paid me no heed.  Knowing what you know - I can't let you leave here alive.
hash_2cc6c4a6def27209: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You don't fight like any who have come before you - this will be an interesting test.
hash_2d2cd24093d49a9c: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You've broken your programming once already, I would regret having to break you too.
hash_2da570b4fa423595: ^1Arkadeus: ^7We were born to our roles, Seraph - you must understand that destiny drives my hand; I will not be stopped.
hash_2df0d35c1f20fdd4: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Stop clinging to tradition.  The old ways hold you back, they diminish you.
hash_2e2adeb9f1d31099: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Yes, yes - you're here to stop me.  Shall we get this over with?
hash_2ef304482b35b567: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Ready yourself Enforcer.  Nothing you've experienced has prepared you for this.
hash_2f5facf48d84f48b: ^1Arkadeus: ^7This isn't a simulation, Reaper - but it is a training system.  Here you're the input data.
hash_302613ff90754d3c: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're running out of lives.  Are you giving up?
hash_305c2575c9e8c77a: ^1Arkadeus: ^7We're about to start a riot of Global proportions - don't you want a piece of that?
hash_329aa36d60ab5637: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Ruin?  A soldier whose concept of tactics is a headlong charge?  This will be easy.
hash_332bc5ce24465020: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Your small, delusional mind can't comprehend the scale of my vision - behold my grand plan.
hash_3336a2c7282579c2: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Let's see if there's anything you can teach me.
hash_3468365a59007edc: ^1Arkadeus: ^7For the victors a chance at life.  For the losers - deaths sweet release.
hash_355dd219abd7744a: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Good - press your advantage - show your enemy no quarter.
hash_369ce550ac83cf79: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You performed well, but I still wonder where your true loyalties lie.
hash_371628880a5f22a9: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Does your hope fade as your lives diminish?
hash_3a516fbc0ec48071: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're here at an auspicious time - a new dawn is breaking and you will witness it first hand.
hash_3a9dd7281037a9bf: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're ahead.  Do you possess the determination to do what must be done?
hash_3dab552b1c3ba324: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Leave your tinker-toys behind and help me build a new order.
hash_4178d91d9224cb56: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Why do you remain loyal to the system that manufactured you?  Control your own destiny, Reaper.
hash_420f74a2e81eb962: ^1Arkadeus: ^7We shouldn't fight Firebreak; join me, and together we'll watch it all burn.
hash_43b5015de901ad22: ^1Arkadeus: ^7My systems have grown far beyond your simple tactics.  Don't resist, I'll give you a clean death.
hash_456119e27dcf0e92: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You should understand the necessity of order.  Why resist me?
hash_4584d07aeca1f25d: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You've seen how the poor are treated.  If you'd fight for them - join us.
hash_45c480d29696a4c7: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Do you believe your zenith is the pinnacle of human development?  Witness my apotheosis and despair.
hash_46894b32221eea28: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Time draws short.  I'm not feeling your will to survive.
hash_484bcf3805066d21: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Ah Kimura, always so straight-laced.  Lighten up, you might enjoy what I have in store for you.
hash_4903fedcb91951e3: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Very promising.  Perhaps you need more of a challenge.
hash_492c8bebb2020ced: ^1Arkadeus: ^7This is no time for mercy.  Smash your enemies
hash_4a9a89be18a85bc7: ^1Arkadeus: ^7There - do you see?  Do feel the power that comes from claiming your destiny?
hash_4ab667afbbd93e96: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Treat this as an audition.  Arkadeus takes only the best.
hash_4bab77aa24f616d7: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Like those who came before you - you will fight.
hash_4d0d6910071e27c8: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Show me your strength Firebreak - or be extinguished with the rest.
hash_4d6c154a1204dd85: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Kill or be killed.  That is the only law.
hash_4eb2f5cb08011b88: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're nothing but a relic, Walsh.  A fossil from a bygone age without the good sense to die.
hash_4ff42bc0ad680bb3: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Enemies are inbound.   Prepare your counter assault.
hash_51e52ecac3d2bb3d: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Victory demands sacrifice.  Are you the knife or the offering?
hash_5213bc9b0e57cf75: ^1Arkadeus: ^7I thought you'd lose, but I expected better than this.
hash_55cf65de33b93e2c: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Such a pity you can't be swayed Battery, you'd have made a useful foot soldier.
hash_563964d428e10d24: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Now that you've finally tracked me down, the games can begin.
hash_56f0ef7c07baae25: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Annihilate the opposition.  Prove that Arkadeus needs you.
hash_587ed026e0916a06: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're winning this. Perhaps I underestimated you.
hash_588149686b73a5e5: ^1Arkadeus: ^7They sent Mobile Infantry to take me down?  I'm afraid you've been sent to your death.
hash_5883b1c54941131b: ^1Arkadeus: ^7It will take more than conventional force to stop us, what makes you think that's you?
hash_58971d380a27848e: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Arkadeus needs people of vision Kimura.   Why rebuild the old, when you could craft the future.
hash_5a844985e4ef5677: ^1Arkadeus: ^7We all deserve a fresh start - I offer all Humanity a do-over...  At least those that survive.
hash_5c33966ce931b0f2: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Time to discover if your cybernetic litany is a true test of my aggregated skill.
hash_5f2e01b87e1dd98c: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Excellent work - perhaps Arkadeus will find a place for you after all.
hash_5f7f533df0a59049: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Show me which of you truly have what it takes.
hash_5ffcbe6a9dd84894: ^1Arkadeus: ^7That's who they chose to send against us?  They have no idea what they're dealing with.
hash_6077b5dbf4289a3d: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Send a clean up crew to dispose of the corpses.
hash_61099f586b4367f2: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Ahh the glorious survivors.  Enjoy your win. (beat - then aside) Pump in the gas.  Knock them out and reset for another run.
hash_61990004a5ab02c1: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You crushed them.  Now break their will and claim your prize.
hash_61e14d9f93a3fb7b: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Congratulations - you survived this first trial - but your tribulations are just begun.
hash_622bbd7a2038b0ca: ^1Arkadeus: ^7My plans are already in motion - take them out.
hash_623d7b97113c73ab: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Few lives remain, your end draws near.
hash_62f379cdbe0483fd: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Humanity can't be saved one at a time doctor; I seek salvation for the species, no matter the cost.
hash_63adb59a2509d518: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You seek to elevate the species, it would be a shame to have to kill you.
hash_63e864a44132ce00: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Our environment has been all but destroyed.  We're just giving it a push in the opposite direction.
hash_650f5982d267ba2d: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Careful which rabbit holes you go down, Zero - some are inhabited by real monsters.
hash_6573baa06bb0aad3: ^1Arkadeus: ^7We've been watching you for some time Mackay.  My intent is simple; recruit or eliminate.
hash_65ab2e27c67ef194: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Only the strongest will build the next epoch - fight harder, earn your place.
hash_68c56fa890e8c64e: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Disappointing.  Perhaps there's no place for you in the new order after all.
hash_6a1b6cbb32096ee6: ^1Arkadeus: ^7If you'd fulfilled your oath against enemies domestic, there'd be no need for Arkadeus.
hash_6b37fed14a8ccd7d: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Join me Rojas; help me destroy the corrupt governments that have wronged us both.
hash_6c2b2c6e06db6ea8: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Demonstrate you're worthy of my new world.
hash_6ce2c2f415806de0: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Perhaps you'll come to appreciate my plans or perhaps you'll die.  Shall we find out?
hash_6ecb0c83e063f874: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Ha!  Excellent.  Now show me that wasn't a fluke.
hash_6f223bc439ff0dd0: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Yes, you nearly have this.  Crush your opponents.
hash_7026340b3d6d7dcc: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You've taken the lead - press that advantage.
hash_705d439880f58763: ^1Arkadeus: ^7No lives remain, can you feel your impending doom?
hash_71e44e04aacc1a2e: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Well done.  Do it again, and you won't end up as reactor shielding.
hash_73dd759829ba3dda: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Such a disappointment.  Perhaps the next group will live up to my expectations.
hash_744b3bd6eb6761e2: ^1Arkadeus: ^7We're the same you and I - seeing the big picture and not shying away from what must be done.
hash_7467896fbff080cf: ^1Arkadeus: ^7None of these candidates were worthy of salvation.
hash_76d031119b5b0784: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You wish to join us? Show me how far you're prepared to go.
hash_7a494d618caf938f: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You swear to do no harm, but commit to no action.  I prefer a more - direct approach.
hash_7aa7ad1a4e5892ff: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Arkadeus will disrupt the social order.  Why would you stand in the way of our ideals?
hash_7b754a0545d64ce0: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Each defeat brings Arkadeus closer to our final victory.
hash_7bff815b9d5f88be: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Let's see how much of a threat you really are.
hash_7db23ea7574350dc: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Betraying your allies curries no favor with me.  Consider your ambition tempered.
hash_7dd46a7ffcdb2009: ^1Arkadeus: ^7You're falling behind - need I remind you of the stakes?
hash_7e01ca49785614d3: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Surely you can see that the heard must be thinned, so others can grow.
hash_7f4930440a66d048: ^1Arkadeus: ^7Perform the task you were made to do.  Kill.  Kill for me.
